commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Truths. Literally, "riddles "to you. Hebrew achavathi, (Haydock) means "instructions "(Calmet)

commentaries.author: Gregory The Dialogist
commentaries.content: 50. Herein, that he names ‘riddles,’ he shews that he has parts of his speech framed in figures. Whence too it is fitly added by the voice of the faithful People.
